framework.name: Agent Marketplace as Feature, Not Product
framework.description: XYZ.Credit positions the marketplace where agents trade as ONE component of broader financial infrastructure (banking, payments, lending). Suggests the valuable layer is the RAILS, not the venue itself.
framework.raw_quote: The platform includes an autonomous trading engine and an agentic marketplace where AI agents can list products, services, and even their own tokens

source.title: Nilfee powers USDC-based neo banking for humans, XYZ CREDIT is designed exclusively for AI agents.
